name: HEVN, inc
long_description:
HEVN is a Mercury for global internet companies. We give companies local bank accounts in banks worldwide to save on FX and transaction fees for global operations. HEVN runs over traditional banks and crypto rails, winning on use cases for internet companies with Stripe, ads payments, and contractors.

Team: 
· 4 co-founders, ex-HOT Labs — a 15M-user multichain wallet and $100M TVL infrastructure. #1 crypto app by users for 8 month.
· Based in SF and UAE
· We used to run our own company in BVI, UAE and HK.
